gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor steps forward, spreads arms wide to show the colorful objects, and smiles while engaging with the learners
a person leans slightly forward, gestures toward the objects, and nods enthusiastically while inviting exploration
a tutor points to the two rows, gesturing with the right hand while explaining the arrangement of objects
a person raises both arms slightly, drawing an imaginary line between the rows and emphasizes the number six with a nod
a tutor takes a small step back, opens palms toward the groups, and encourages the class to count along cheerfully
a person walks to the side, gestures with one hand toward the imagined groups, and smiles while prompting students to count
a tutor spreads arms wide in celebration, nods enthusiastically, and smiles broadly while summarizing the lesson
a person steps slightly forward, points with both hands at an imaginary array, and encourages students to remember this concept
